name: SCXCode
description: SCX in VS Code the Kritical way — chat + inline complete + model picker + auto-failover for MiniMax-M2.7 / MAGPiE / gpt-oss-120b / DeepSeek-V3.1 / coder / gemma-4 / Qwen3 / Llama-4-Maverick.

commands.title: Kritical: Show SCX Status (models / quota / fallback chain)
Kritical: Audit Current Diff vs CLAUDE.md HARD RULES

kritical.scxcode.apiKey.description: SCX API key. Default reads HKCU env SCX_API_KEY (Kritical convention). Set explicitly to override.
kritical.scxcode.apiKey.markdownDescription: SCX API key. **Default reads HKCU env `SCX_API_KEY`** (Kritical convention). Set explicitly here to override per-workspace. Never commit the resolved value.

kritical.scxcode.baseUrl.description: SCX API base URL. Change only if you point at a self-hosted SCX mirror.

enumDescriptions: 230B sparse MoE (10B active) — default agentic pick, 192K ctx
117B MoE from scx.ai — near o4-mini reasoning, 131K ctx
671B MoE (37B active) — reserve for hardest problems, 131K ctx
Google Gemma 4 31B — multimodal + thinking-mode toggle, 131K ctx
Llama 4 Maverick 400B MoE — multimodal text+image, 131K ctx
SCX coder — highest context 196K, optimised for algorithms/debugging
kritical.scxcode.defaultModel.description: Default model for chat + slash commands. Override per-message with /model or the picker.

kritical.scxcode.autocompleteModel.description: Model for inline autocomplete. `coder` gives 196K ctx which fits large files.

kritical.scxcode.fallbackChain.description: Auto-failover chain on 429 / 5xx. Tries each in order. Empty array disables failover.
kritical.scxcode.fallbackChain.markdownDescription: Auto-failover chain on **429 / 5xx**. Tries each in order. Set to `[]` to disable failover (single-model mode).

enumDescriptions: Never summarise — send full history until model context limit (may fail on long chats)
Summarise oldest turns when context reaches 75% (recommended)
Summarise more aggressively at 50% (better for long-lived chats)
kritical.scxcode.autocompact.description: How to compress chat history when the conversation approaches model context length.

kritical.scxcode.systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful coding assistant working inside VS Code. Prefer concise answers with code diffs. Never invent APIs — verify via docs first. When editing Kritical code, follow the HARD RULES in CLAUDE.md.
kritical.scxcode.systemPrompt.description: System message prepended to every chat.
kritical.scxcode.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: System message prepended to every chat. **Empty string disables** the default; be explicit.

kritical.scxcode.telemetry.description: Cost + latency telemetry. `off` = zero collection. `local-only` = writes to Kritical.SCXCode.log in workspace. `kritical-endpoint` = also POSTs to Kritical telemetry endpoint (requires opt-in HKCU var).

enumDescriptions: No auto-context. Only the operator's prompt is sent.
Include active file path + language + ± 30-line cursor window.
Include file details + selection when non-empty (falls back to cursor window if no selection).
Also include workspace root name (adds ~50 tokens).
kritical.scxcode.autoContext.description: How much editor state to inject as a system-prefix on every chat/slash command. Costs a few hundred tokens per turn.

kritical.scxcode.autoContextMaxChars.description: Cap the auto-context code snippet at N characters (0.15 * tokens ratio → 8K chars ≈ 1.2K tokens).

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Extension reads SCX_API_KEY from HKCU env; safe. It does NOT execute untrusted workspace code. Chat + inline complete require trust because they can act on file contents.
